data.content: Rejecting shipment: src/components/settings-sheet.tsx:65-67 sets scopeRefinement.enabled to true in the Settings UI defaults, while src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160 and src/lib/settings.ts:593-615 default scope refinement to disabled unless explicitly configured. Saving or resetting settings from the UI can therefore re-enable automatic scope refinement on installs that were meant to stay opted out.
